description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator responsible for tracking subject visits. Perform an end-of-week data cleanup in OpenClinica (username 'root', password 'Admin123!') for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Mark the following visits as 'Skipped' or 'Stopped' and add the specified discrepancy notes (Type: Annotation): Subject DM-101 'Week 4 Follow-up' (Note: Missed due to COVID-19 infection), Subject DM-102 'Baseline Assessment' (Note: Subject experienced transportation issues), and Subject DM-103 'Week 4 Follow-up' (Note: Subject withdrew consent).
